projectDescription: A hyperlocal tricimoto transport platform for Crucita, Ecuador, connecting passengers and drivers in real time via GPS tracking, Socket.io chat, and a role-based REST API.
keyFeatures: Real-time GPS tracking of tricimoto drivers via Socket.io sector rooms
Role-based access control (passenger, driver, admin) enforced on every REST endpoint and WebSocket connection
Full ride lifecycle management: solicitado → aceptado → en_curso → finalizado/cancelado
Automatic chat thread creation when a driver accepts a ride, with Row Level Security enforced at the database level
Phone-based OTP authentication via Supabase Auth (SMS sign-in, no passwords)
Fixed-price tariff system based on predefined geographic sectors of Crucita
Glassmorphic UI design system with translucent cards, backdrop blur, and 60fps Reanimated animations
Panic (SOS) button with animated pulse effect for passenger safety
Dual transport layer: REST API for transactional operations + WebSockets for live events
PostGIS spatial columns for efficient geofence queries on driver locations
publicApiSurface: POST /api/auth/registro — register a user profile (passenger or driver)
POST /api/viajes/solicitar — create a ride request (passenger only)
POST /api/viajes/aceptar — accept a pending ride (driver only)
PATCH /api/viajes/:id/estado — update ride state (en_curso, finalizado, cancelado)
GET /api/chats/:threadId/mensajes — fetch chat message history for a ride thread
Socket event: join_sector — subscribe to a geographic sector room
Socket event: update_location — broadcast driver GPS coordinates to sector room
Socket event: join_chat — join a ride-specific chat room
Socket event: send_message — send a real-time chat message
Socket event (server→client): location_updated — receive driver location updates
Socket event (server→client): message_received — receive incoming chat messages
useSupabaseAuth() — hook: sendOtp, verifyOtp, registerProfile, signOut
useSocket() — hook: joinSector, updateLocation, joinChat, sendMessage, onEvent
useTariff(originSectorId, destinationSectorId) — hook: formattedPrice, formattedTime, formattedDistance
useAuthStore — Zustand store: session, user, profile, setSession, clearSession
useRideStore — Zustand store: activeRide, setRideStatus, setDriver, clearRide
useLocationStore — Zustand store: location state and updates
SECTORS — constant array of 5 geographic sectors in Crucita
TARIFFS — constant array of 10 fixed-price route tariff entries
findTariff(originId, destinationId) — bidirectional tariff lookup utility
findNearestSector(lat, lng) — nearest sector from GPS coordinates
